title: Pinch to zoom
drDigitalIntro:
Zooming makes things bigger or smaller.
• Spread two fingers apart to zoom in.
• Pinch two fingers together to zoom out.
• In the activity, zoom in to find the hidden number in the text.

playgroundTask.instructions: Open the browser. Pinch two fingers apart on the trackpad to zoom in (or tap the + button). Read the tiny promo code, then type it in the box.

drDigitalSuccess: You zoomed in and read the tiny code — great detective work!
drDigitalHint: Put two fingers on the trackpad and spread them apart to zoom in — or click the + button. Keep zooming until the little promo code is easy to read, then type it in.
